violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Shelving units in the the walk in cooler currently are using cardboard to hold items. These need to be removed as cardboard is not smooth and easily cleanable. Walk in freezer has condensation issues. Lots of ice build up in freezer.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil * was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. Cutting board in the meat area is in need of repair and/or replacement.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. Walk in coolers throughout the the kitchen have very dusty fans that are in need of cleaning.
